news.summary: The data on Ethereum futures indicates a positive momentum, as the price of ETH has surged by over 100% since hitting lows in April. This increase raises the likelihood of a potential rally that could see ETH reaching $4,000 in the upcoming weeks.
news.headline: $20B in Ethereum futures open interest reaches record high as ETH price doubles since April lows, possibly rallying to $4,000 soon.

news.summary: Last week, a report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 6.2%, which is the highest in over a decade. Additionally, over 1.5 million people have lost their jobs in the past month alone due to the economic downturn caused by the ongoing pandemic. The government has announced plans to provide financial assistance to those affected by job losses, but experts predict that the unemployment rate may continue to rise in the coming months. Furthermore, it was reported that the stock market has also been significantly affected, with the main index dropping by 15% in the last month. This economic crisis is expected to have long-lasting effects on the country's economy.
news.headline: US withdraws several embassy staff from Middle East due to escalating tensions, numbers unspecified.

news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2025, there was a notable rise in revenues by 4.0%, reaching $125.3 million compared to $120.5 million in the same quarter the previous year. Sequentially, revenue growth was observed across all segments, with a total increase of $9.5 million, equivalent to 8.3%, from the third quarter of 2025. Of the total revenue generated, 87% was attributed to various areas of the business, indicating a broad-based revenue improvement during this quarter.
news.headline: Alithya sees revenue rise to $125.3M in Q4-2025, 4% increase from last year. Sequential growth of 8.3%.

news.summary: In Sydney, grocery retailers implementing L’s tactical loyalty campaigns are experiencing a noteworthy 3.8% increase in like-for-like sales growth. This growth comes amidst challenges such as escalating costs, trade disputes, and inflation, all of which are squeezing already narrow profit margins. The impact of tariffs and supply chain interruptions is driving consumer prices higher, leading shoppers to place increased emphasis on value when deciding where and how frequently to shop. Retailers are currently managing a demanding situation characterized by mounting costs and changing consumer preferences.
news.headline: Grocery retailers boost sales by 3.8% with new data-driven loyalty programs amid rising costs and trade tensions.

news.summary: The European Central Bank (ECB) announced in its 2025 annual review that the euro has been surpassed by gold as the second-largest reserve asset globally. Amid a rise in central bank acquisitions and historic high prices for gold, the yellow metal now constitutes 20% of reserves, narrowing the gap with the leading U.S. dollar at 46%. Real gold prices in 2024, adjusted for inflation, exceeded the peak set during the 1979 oil crisis. Central banks currently hold about 36,000 tons of gold, nearing levels last observed during the Bretton Woods era, although this amount represents a smaller proportion of overall gold supply. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Gold has surpassed the euro as the second-largest reserve asset globally, with 20% of reserves, closing in on the leading U.S. dollar at 46%, according to the ECB. Gold prices hit record highs, with real prices in 2024 exceeding levels seen during the 1979 oil crisis. Central banks hold around 36,000 tons of gold reserves, akin to Bretton Woods times.

news.summary: A report on the Lithium-Ion Satellite Battery Materials Market has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings in Dublin. The global market for these materials is currently experiencing growth, attributed to developments in space technology, rising interest in efficient satellite power solutions, and a move towards sustainability. The report covers the period from 2025 to 2034 and provides a comprehensive analysis of the market at both global and regional levels. Key focuses include products, applications, and country-specific insights. The growth stage of the lifecycle indicates promising trends for the industry.
news.headline: Global lithium-ion satellite battery materials market set to grow from 2025-2034, driven by advancements in space technology.

news.summary: Wipro Limited unveiled its latest report titled "The AI Advantage: Building Tomorrow’s Insurance Enterprise" today. The report delves into the benefits and implications of integrating artificial intelligence into insurance businesses. This announcement comes from East Brunswick, N.J., and Bengaluru, India.
news.headline: U.S. insurers plan to more than double AI investments in next 3-5 years according to Wipro report.

news.summary: In Oakland, California, Marqeta, Inc. (NASDAQ: MQ), a leading modern card issuing platform worldwide, has partnered with Klarna, a global digital bank and payments provider, to introduce the Klarna Card. This new debit card, powered by Visa Flexible Credential (VFC), grants users access to versatile payment choices. Marqeta achieved the distinction of becoming the inaugural issuer processor in the United States certified for Visa in July 2024.
news.headline: Marqeta partners with Klarna to launch new Klarna Debit Card in US, powered by Visa, offering flexible payment options.

news.summary: A company specializing in implantable continuous EEG monitoring, Epiminder, unveiled the findings of its UMPIRE clinical trial in the Epilepsia journal. The study, conducted in top Australian hospitals, showcased the safety and effectiveness of their iCEM device in capturing quality EEG data for prolonged durations. This innovative technology proves to be on par with the current standard of care in epilepsy management.
news.headline: Epiminder published results of UMPIRE trial - validates safety/efficacy of Minder® System. High-quality EEG data captured.

news.summary: The KCC US Hurricane Reference Model Version 5.0 has received certification from the Florida Commission on Hurricane Loss Projection Methodology (FCHLPM), making KCC the inaugural model vendor to achieve this status as per the newest FLCHPM guidelines. Notable improvements in the updated KCC Hurricane Model, engineered by KCC's team, involve additional secondary building features and updated vulnerability parameters. This latest version marks a significant step in enhancing hurricane risk assessment.
news.headline: KCC's Hurricane Model 5.0 certified by FL Commission. First vendor certified under latest standards. Incorporates key enhancements.

news.summary: Based in Fairfax, Virginia, K12 SIX is a nonprofit organization established in 2020, currently marking its fifth year of operation. It serves as the primary cyber threat intelligence community for the K-12 education sector in the United States.
news.headline: Nonprofit K12 SIX celebrates its fifth anniversary as U.S. K-12 cyber threat intel community founded in 2020.

news.summary: In Ottawa, Ontario, Kinaxis® (TSX: KXS), a top player in supply chain orchestration, is organizing a digital event on June 17, 2025, at 11:00 am EST. The event, titled Tariffs, Trade, and Turbulence: How to Respond to Today’s Supply Chain Challenges, will feature economic futurist Andrew Busch and will focus on addressing the impact of global trade tensions on businesses. This event is aimed at technology and life sciences supply chain leaders.
news.headline: Kinaxis will host digital event on tariffs and trade challenges for supply chain leaders with economic futurist on June 17, 2025.

news.summary: In Midland, Texas, New Era Helium, Inc. (NEHC) disclosed plans for a joint venture with Sharon AI, Inc. called Texas Critical Data Centers, LLC (TCDC). The venture is focused on developing AI infrastructure in Ector County, Texas. NEHC, listed on Nasdaq as NEHC, is a cutting-edge exploration and production entity in the Permian Basin. Though no official agreement has been finalized, TCDC is currently in talks with significant corporate clients to secure their involvement in the project. This initiative represents a key step in establishing a robust AI network in the region.
news.headline: New Era Helium (NEHC) in discussions for AI infrastructure buildout in Ector County, Texas, targeting large enterprise customers. Board expansion planned.

news.summary: A company in Boston, Sensible Biotechnologies, has announced that they are speeding up the advancement of their cell-based platform for cutting-edge mRNA medicines using NVIDIA AI technology.
news.headline: Sensible Biotechnologies uses NVIDIA AI platform to cut time optimizing mRNA therapeutics by over 90%.

news.summary: In Washington, FiscalNote has made significant advancements to its policy forecasting tool, PolicyNote. The updates include improved AI capabilities for legislative forecasting, alerts, and bill discovery. The enhancements aim to boost efficiency and accuracy in tracking legislative developments. This move underscores FiscalNote's commitment to innovation, as they continue to invest in cutting-edge technology.
news.headline: FiscalNote boosts AI innovation with new upgrades to PolicyNote for legislative forecasting, alerts, and bill discovery in Washington.

news.summary: Karooooo Ltd. has disclosed the details of an underwritten secondary public offering involving 1,500,000 ordinary shares owned by Isaias (Zak) Jose Calisto, the company's CEO. The offering sets the public price at $50.00 per ordinary share, amounting to an estimated total of $75.0 million in gross proceeds. The process is slated for closure on June 13, 2025, pending the completion of standard closing prerequisites.
news.headline: Karooooo Ltd. CEO to sell 1.5M shares at $50 per share in secondary public offering, raising $75M. Offering closes June 13.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.6% in 2021. This growth is driven by robust expansions in advanced economies, particularly in the United States and China. Emerging markets and developing economies are also expected to see a rebound, with growth forecasted at 6.3% for 2021. However, this positive outlook is accompanied by a warning of significant disparities in recovery between different countries and regions. The report highlights the importance of continued policy support to ensure a more inclusive and sustainable recovery from the impacts of the COVID-19 pandemic. It also emphasizes the need for international cooperation to address challenges such as vaccine distribution and debt sustainability. Overall, the global economy is showing signs of recovery, but concerted efforts are required to ensure a balanced and resilient growth path in the coming years.
news.headline: Oil prices drop as traders assess Middle East tensions.

news.summary: Builders from the DFW area have been extended an invitation to select prime lots in Orchards 16A, the upcoming phase in Pecan Plantation, GRANBURY. Patten Properties is offering builder-preferred lots in this highly anticipated phase that boasts resort-style amenities. Scheduled for launch in the near future, this opportunity allows DFW builders the first pick of these sought-after lots.
news.headline: Patten Properties will host an exclusive DFW Builder Preview Event on June 21 for the new Orchards 16A phase in Granbury's Pecan Plantation.

news.summary: USANA, a prominent global nutrition company, received accolades at the Best of State awards in Salt Lake City, Utah on June 12, 2025. The company was recognized for its outstanding products, including the CellSentials supplement and Celavive skincare line, as well as its innovative research and development initiatives. Additionally, USANA was lauded for its philanthropic efforts through the USANA Foundation.
news.headline: USANA wins 5 Best of State Awards, including Best of State Statue. Recognized for CellSentials, Celavive, R&D, USANA Foundation. Utah, June 12, 2025.

news.summary: In Detroit, on June 12, 2025, the Barbara Ann Karmanos Cancer Institute's Office of Community, in collaboration with the Detroit Public Library, is hosting a seminar series called Community Conversations on Cancer. This initiative provides an opportunity for Michigan residents to gain insights from researchers and physician-scientists. The sessions aim to educate and engage individuals on crucial aspects related to cancer. This partnership underscores the importance of community involvement in understanding and addressing the challenges posed by cancer.
news.headline: Karmanos Cancer Institute hosts seminars in June on lung cancer diagnosis and treatment, in collaboration with Detroit Public Library.

news.summary: The first production of pharmaceutical-grade egg and milk challenge meals has been successfully completed. The product range of challenge meals has expanded to now include peanut, milk, and egg varieties. Additionally, ongoing innovation efforts are focused on developing products that cater to the top 9 allergens, as well as products suitable for consumption from as early as 6 months of age. This milestone was achieved in DEESIDE, Wales, and marks a significant advancement in providing safe and accessible dietary options for individuals with specific dietary requirements.
news.headline: Reacta Healthcare in DEESIDE, Wales transforms into a multi-allergen manufacturing facility, offering egg and milk challenge meals and innovating to develop 'Top 9' allergen products suitable for infants, effective from June 12, 2025.

news.summary: In London, Kynisca, the pioneering global organization for women’s football, has named Jennifer LaMothe as its Chief People & Culture Officer. LaMothe is tasked with spearheading people-focused efforts throughout Kynisca, crafting pioneering strategies for organizational success. Her responsibilities include fostering a cohesive culture that transcends cultural and geographic differences, a crucial aspect of Kynisca's worldwide presence.
news.headline: Jennifer LaMothe is appointed as Chief People & Culture Officer at Kynisca, a women’s football organization, focusing on global excellence.

news.summary: Oshkosh Defense LLC, a subsidiary of Oshkosh Corporation (NYSE: OSK), based in Oshkosh, Wisconsin, has revealed a new contract extension for the Family of Medium Tactical Vehicles A2 (FMTV A2). This extension spans three years and permits the U.S. Army to make further orders for the FMTV A2, including three FMTV A2 Low Velocity Air Drop (LVAD) variants, up until February 2028. This arrangement enables the Army to maintain their fleet modernization efforts with reliable medium tactical vehicles.
news.headline: Oshkosh Defense gets 3-year contract extension for FMTV A2, allowing US Army to order FMTV A2 until Feb 2028.

news.summary: An acquisition deal was revealed by The Baldwin Group stating that Westwood Insurance Agency LLC, a subsidiary of The Baldwin Group, will purchase all outstanding equity interests of Hippo Holdings, Inc.'s homebuilder distribution network. This strategic move, referred to as The Partnership, reinforces Westwood's position in the market. Hippo Holdings, Inc. and its affiliates, listed under NYSE as HIPO, will be parting with their various entities as part of this agreement.
news.headline: Baldwin Group agrees to acquire homebuilder distribution network from Hippo, solidifying Westwood's position; Hippo's affiliates involved.
